name: IDBI Bank Winnings Credit Card
tagline: Premium card with domestic & international lounge access and flat cashback
description: The IDBI Bank Winnings Credit Card is a premium credit card offering a unique flat 10% cashback on all transactions of Rs 500 or more, plus free domestic AND international airport lounge access, accidental death insurance, and reward points on all spends. Ideal for users who value comprehensive lounge access and strong cashback on everyday transactions.

notes: Recommended annual income of Rs 3 Lakh+

charges.label: Annual Fee
charges.note: Plus applicable GST from second year

conditions: Complimentary domestic AND international airport lounge access
Visa network lounge program membership required
Lounge visits subject to availability
Guest access available at additional charge

benefits.title: Flat 10% Cashback Welcome Benefit
benefits.description: Get flat 10% cashback on all transactions of Rs 500 or more, up to a maximum of Rs 500, within 90 days of card issuance.
conditions: Applicable on transactions of Rs 500 or more
Maximum cashback of Rs 500 within 90 days
Cashback credited within 30 days of qualifying period

benefits.title: Reward Points on All Spends
benefits.description: Earn 2 Delight Points for every Rs 100 spent across all merchant categories in India and abroad.
conditions: Points credited on retail, online, and international spends
Fuel, wallet loads, and utility bills may be excluded

benefits.title: Domestic Airport Lounge Access
benefits.description: Complimentary access to domestic airport lounges across India through the Visa Airport Lounge Program.
conditions: Visa Airport Lounge Program membership required
Subject to lounge availability
Applicable at participating domestic airport lounges

benefits.title: International Airport Lounge Access
benefits.description: Complimentary access to international airport lounges worldwide through the Visa and LoungeKey programs.
conditions: Visa and LoungeKey program membership required
Subject to lounge availability
Applicable at participating international airport lounges

benefits.title: Fuel Surcharge Waiver
benefits.description: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between Rs 4,000 and Rs 5,000 at all fuel stations across India.
conditions: Applicable on fuel transactions between Rs 4,000 and Rs 5,000
Narrower range than typical fuel cards
Available at all fuel stations in India

benefits.title: Accidental Death Cover
benefits.description: Accidental death insurance cover of Rs 10 Lakh for cardholders aged 18-70 who have used the card for at least one transaction in the last 90 days.
conditions: Applicable for cardholders aged 18-70
At least one transaction required in last 90 days
Coverage valid for the primary cardholder only
Claims must be filed within 30 days of incident

benefits.title: Interest-Free Credit Period
benefits.description: Enjoy up to 48 days of interest-free credit period on all retail transactions.
conditions: Applicable on retail purchases only
Cash advances attract interest from day one

benefits.title: Global ATM Access
benefits.description: Access cash from 1.88 million ATMs globally through the Visa network, both in India and abroad.
conditions: Visa network acceptance worldwide
ATM charges as per applicable schedule
International withdrawal fees may apply

rewardProgram.name: IDBI Delight Points
rewardProgram.earnRate: 2 DP per Rs 100 on all spends

bonusCategories.description: 2 Delight Points per Rs 100 on all spends

conditions: Points credited within 30 days of transaction posting
Points expire 2 years from accrual date
Minimum 500 points required for redemption

welcomeBonus.description: Get flat 10% cashback on all transactions of Rs 500 or more, up to a maximum of Rs 500, within 90 days of card issuance.
conditions: Applicable on transactions of Rs 500 or more
Maximum cashback of Rs 500 within 90 days
Cashback credited within 30 days of qualifying period

milestoneBonuses.description: Earn 1,500 bonus Delight Points on annual spend of Rs 2 Lakh
Earn 3,000 bonus Delight Points on annual spend of Rs 4 Lakh

feeWaivers.description: Annual fee waived on annual spend of Rs 2 Lakh

features: Flat 10% cashback up to Rs 500 on transactions Rs 500+
Free domestic AND international airport lounge access
Accidental death insurance of Rs 10 Lakh
Up to 48 days interest-free credit period
Annual fee waiver on Rs 2 Lakh spend

reviews.summary: Outstanding value card with both domestic and international lounge access, strong cashback welcome benefit, and insurance.
pros: Free domestic AND international lounge access
Flat 10% cashback up to Rs 500 on Rs 500+ transactions
cons: Fuel surcharge waiver has narrow range
Higher interest rate of 3.4% per month
